MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC's Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admissions Be Demeed Admitted; Request For Monetary Sanctions will be heard in at 9:00 am on the Discovery Calendar. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

Plaintiff Cach Llc'S Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted; Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-29-2013 Continued To Aug-08-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance(s) on MON-JUL-29-2013:
Robert F. Cohen, Esq. of Law Office of Robert F. Cohen [310.858.9771] Specially appearing for CACH, LLC, plaintiff / moving party;
No appearance by or on behalf of defendant.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Plaintiff CACH LLC'S Motion for Order that Matters in Request for Admissions Be Deemed Admitted; Request for Monetary Sanctions is continued to August 8, 2013 to give Plaintiff the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. No later than July 29, 3013 at 4 pm, Plaintiff must deliver courtesy copies of its moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date of August 8, 3013, or the motion is subject to being denied. Judge Pro Tem: Ernst Halperin; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)
